strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning with emerging tech needs
Diverse programming language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python, D, C++) and cloud/containerization (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Recent employment history shows frequent job changes (every 1-3 years), which may raise questions about long-term commitment
Limited mention of testing frameworks like Vitest or Playwright in the resume, despite required skill
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js/Nest.js/React) is well-covered, but secondary tech (Kotlin/Java) lacks recent or detailed examples
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack expertise with TypeScript and Node.js, along with valuable AI-agent development experience that aligns with modern enterprise needs. His diverse language skills and contributions to open-source projects are notable. However, the frequent job changes and limited recent testing framework experience may warrant further discussion in an interview to assess stability and alignment with current technical requirements.
